summary: YAML emission: pin omitted-optional-field behavior (omit key entirely, never null). Empty tags emit `tags: []`. Fold into T3 frontmatter emission.
Split VaultNotConfigured into two exception classes: VaultNotConfiguredError (exit 1, default-write) and VaultNotConfiguredSkip (exit 0, --lint). Both inherit from WikiWriteError. Update T3.

Backup dedupe scope: WIKI_CONV_CLAUDE_MD_BACKED_UP guard must cover ALL three ~/CLAUDE.md writers (append_wiki_preflight_instruction, claude-md-merge.py, sentinel-block injector). Move backup creation to TOP of Zone B before any writer runs. Update T9.
Drop _prune_old_backups + MONSTERFLOW_BACKUP_RETAIN_DAYS entirely. Defer until backups accumulate in practice. Remove from D10 + T9.
--entity-type defaults to 'other' (not required). Drop --topic-title flag entirely. Update D13 + T3.
Add 'grep -q test-wiki-write.sh tests/run-tests.sh' assertion as a specific test case in T11 to catch orchestrator-wiring drift even if T7 silently fails.
T1 (templates/wiki-conventions.md) should explicitly mention D14's Obsidian Settings → Files & Links → Excluded files manual step. One sentence at the end.
Add D15 to design.md: /wrap Phase 2c lint runs in /wrap and /wrap-insights when vault configured; SKIPPED in /wrap-quick. Update T10 to honor existing Phase 2c quick-skip behavior.

Add D16 to design.md: scripts/wiki-write.py is Python 3.9-compatible. No | union types, no match statements, no parenthesized context managers. Drops version-check requirement from _install_vault_conventions. Update Risk #4.
Update AC #8(e) and T8 to reference exactly 4 lint violation types (em-dash, mixed-case, projects-flat-file 3a, projects-folder-no-index 3b). Spaces-in-filename dropped per SD-6.
Remove 'exclude: true' from _convention.md frontmatter (Obsidian doesn't honor it natively). Keep 'type: convention' as agent-readable hint. Update T9 + templates/wiki-conventions.md.

Install sequencing fix already in spec AC #7: two-stage split — vault _convention.md writes inside do_knowledge_layer, ~/CLAUDE.md sentinel-block injection AFTER claude-md-merge.py at install.sh:1440. T9 must implement BOTH points; specifically a new function (_install_wiki_conventions_claude_md_block) called post-baseline-merge.
